rules:
18＋ （It's a drinking lobbyǃ）
High-level overview of rules:
This is an 18+ community only,
No NSFW content of any kind is allowed, stay SFW.
You must abide by Nox Vitae's, and VRChat's TOS.
For ban appeals and more information, please see noxvitaellc.com


If you have any problems resolve it or ask a mod for help․
infoBoard:
From massive collaborations, compact collaborations, weekly community event hosting, and sponsorships, Nox Vitae exists to make sure every event hits harder, runs smoother, and leaves you saying “damn, remember that one party?” Est. 2023

Our Pillars,
Community-First, Always
Big orgs, small clubs, solo creators. We bring them together. Nox Vitae is the bridge that turns individual visions into shared realities, connecting people who might never have crossed paths otherwise.

Learn It. Build It. Throw the Party.
We don’t gatekeep. If you want to learn how to plan, host, or build your own nightlife space, we’ll show you how. Because empowering others to create is how the scene grows.

Adults Only (For a Reason)
Let’s be clear: our events are safe-for-work—but not for kids. We believe VR nightlife belongs to grown folks. Expect DJs, go-gos, drinking games, and immersive spaces built for the 18+ crowd. No exceptions.

Smarter Events Through Collaboration
We don’t just build bigger, we build better. By partnering across the platform, we bring in fresh thinking from worldbuilders, marketers, and organizers to make sure every event pushes what’s possible in VRChat.
